name: Orange Roughy Veracruz
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté 7 minutes or until tender. Add peppers and tomatos; cook over medium-high heat 3 minutes. Add fish; sprinkle with garlic powder and pepper. Cover and reduce heat, simmer 5 minutes.
2. Turn fish over. Cover and simmer an additional 5 minutes or until fish flakes with a fork. Transfer to individual serving plates, reserving cooking sauce in skillet. Keep fish warm.
3. Place skillet with cooking sauce over medium-high heat, and cook 3 minutes or until thickened. Serve sauce over fish.
Calories: 149 per serving
